title: Harden AgentOS Architecture 2.0 canonical source, Codex layer and deployment gates

tasks.title: Publish Architecture 2.0 as canonical source
tasks.goal: Make docs/ARCHITECTURE.md the complete canonical source for Architecture 2.0 and route active docs to it.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Publish AgentOS Architecture 2.0 as the canonical source verified by npm test and npm run validate.
agentGoal.outcome: Architecture 2.0 is documented as the canonical source and referenced by SPEC, PLAN and INDEX.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm test, npm run validate and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: Do not create a competing architecture source.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Edit the smallest set of docs and harness files required to make the source of truth unambiguous.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: SPEC, PLAN and INDEX identify the canonical source.

evidence.result: Contract tests passed after Architecture 2.0 canonical-source docs were published.

tasks.title: Eliminate .codex drift from codex-layer
tasks.goal: Make .codex/config.toml match the canonical codex-layer/config.toml file.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Remove .codex drift verified by the Architecture 2.0 contract test.
constraints: Do not introduce machine-specific secrets or enabled local MCP credentials.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Prefer copying canonical content from codex-layer into .codex.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: Tests fail if the two files drift again.

evidence.result: Contract tests passed after .codex/config.toml was aligned with codex-layer/config.toml.

tasks.title: Replace false deploy with fail-closed deploy contract
tasks.goal: Ensure deploy does not report success without a real configured deployment target.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Replace the false deploy script with a fail-closed deployment contract verified by tests.
agentGoal.outcome: scripts/deploy.ps1 exits non-zero without AGENTOS_DEPLOY_COMMAND and explains the required configuration.
constraints: Do not run a real deployment without an explicit command and approval.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Fail closed first, then allow explicit configured execution.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: Deploy output does not present itself as a placeholder.

evidence.result: Contract tests passed after deploy was changed to fail closed.

tasks.title: Expand validation and record evidence
tasks.goal: Make tests part of validation and record current command evidence.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Expand AgentOS validation with contract tests and record fresh evidence in docs/REVIEW.md.
agentGoal.outcome: npm run validate includes npm test, doctor checks the test surface, and REVIEW records fresh evidence.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run doctor, npm test, npm run validate and git diff --check
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Use Node built-in test runner and existing validators.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: npm test runs Architecture 2.0 contract tests.
npm run validate includes npm test.
docs/REVIEW.md records command evidence and remaining risks.

evidence.result: Template, context, secret and contract-test gates passed.
